description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Morph

You partially transform, blending wolf and human into a powerful fighting form. Apply the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-devil-fruit-artifacts.devil-fruit-effects.Item.wolfhybrideffect1]{Wolf: Hybrid Form} effect to yourself. Remove it to revert to human form.

While in Hybrid Form:

  • Your Speed increases by 10 feet.
  • You gain a +2 status bonus to Athletics and Perception.
  • Your unarmed Strikes become Wolf Bite (1d10 piercing, trip, grapple) and Wolf Claws (1d6 slashing, agile, versatile P).
  • Your unarmed Strikes are treated as magical for overcoming resistances and immunities.

You can maintain Hybrid Form indefinitely. Activating Full Wolf Form automatically ends Hybrid Form (remove this effect and apply the beast form effect instead).

Suppressed while Sea-Bound — remove this effect if you become Sea-Bound.
description.gm: The mechanical bonuses (speed, Athletics, Perception) are delivered by the Wolf: Hybrid Form effect item, which also sets the wolf-human:hybrid-form roll option used by Apex Wolf's physical resistance.
